mayakoba.title: Mayakoba Finance Project
mayakoba.description: I participated in the creation of the Purchase Order and Payment Order modules (Screenshots contain simulated data for demonstration purposes).

expomex.title: Expomex
expomex.description: I helped collaborate on maintenance and bug fixes for this web application.

equilibrio.title: Equilibrio Total Project
equilibrio.description: I developed a mobile application to register attendance for Equilibrio Total staff using QR codes

trackit.title: HPL Trackit
trackit.description: I developed an Uber-style mobile application for carriers and cargo services. The platform allows requesting trips for transporting products or goods, with real-time tracking and driver and transport management.
